creator: sunpoet@FreeBSD.org
text:
Patch updated.

Please confirm if "multimedia/avinfo/files/patch-src-ass.y" exists after "arc patch D9073". Phabricator considered this file as binary due to Russian characters. With this file (also available at [1]), the log [2] should looks like:

...
=======================<phase: patch          >============================
===>  Patching for avinfo-1.0.a15
===>  Applying FreeBSD patches for avinfo-1.0.a15
===========================================================================
...

[1] https://people.freebsd.org/~sunpoet/bison/patch-src-ass.y
[2] https://people.FreeBSD.org/~sunpoet/bison/avinfo-1.0.a15.log
